creator: dufault@hd.dmc.com
text:
When I try to use Sun pcnfs version 5.0 with the setup that works
with 1.1.5 I get:

"NFS039F : The NET USE failed with an internal error code of 1007"

when I try to mount a file system from the PC.  This
happens with both the pcnfsd 1.1.5 binary and a new binary created
on -current.  "ftp" and "telnet" from Sun work fine.

Fix: 

Run mountd with -n.
